title: July newsletter: Latest updates from the IAA
body: "The Immigration Advice Authority (IAA) has published the July edition of its newsletter – your trusted source for the latest updates on our work, policy changes, and key events shaping the immigration advice sector.   In the July 2025 edition, you’ll find:     our updated Customer Service Charter    highlights from our latest conference    a new Border Security, Asylum and Immigration Bill factsheet packed with key information    the latest guidance and publications     Whether you’re part of an organisation, or simply interested in the safe and effective delivery of immigration advice in the UK, the newsletter is packed with useful information and ways to stay engaged with our work.   Download the July newsletter and stay informed about the work we’re doing to protect advice seekers and promote best practice across the sector.   If you haven’t already, you can subscribe to receive future editions directly to your inbox by signing up to our mailing list. "
